settings.title: Practical AI Automation
settings.idea: A beginner-friendly guide to designing reliable AI-assisted workflows for small teams.
settings.target_audience: Technical beginners and small business teams
settings.additional_instructions: Use practical examples and flag claims that should be verified.

subtitle: From First Prototype to Reliable Workflow

chapters.title: Choosing the Right Automation
chapters.summary: Define a useful problem, users, boundaries and success criteria.

sections.title: Start With the Workflow
sections.summary: Map the existing human process before choosing a model.

sections.title: Define Reliability
sections.summary: Turn quality, latency and cost expectations into checks.

chapters.title: Building the First Version
chapters.summary: Create a small, observable implementation with human review.

sections.title: Prompt and Data Boundaries
sections.summary: Separate instructions, user data and expected output schemas.

sections.title: Evaluation and Feedback
sections.summary: Collect examples and improve the workflow with repeatable tests.
